What'd I Miss?

Raised in the Bay and shaped on the Central Coast, I've learned to be comfortable not having everything figured out. Three principles guide my life: be intentional, stay present, and take the next step.

Outside academics, you'll find me playing sports, learning about nutrition, or volunteering in my community.

Work Experience

Since May 2025

California Polytechnic State University, SLO

Serving as a vital link between university housing administration and the student body. Managing high-volume residential services, acting as an organizational liaison translating complex policy updates into transparent communication for residents.

Since April 2025

Community Action Partnership San Luis Obispo

Working as a Payroll and HR Assistant ensuring financial accuracy and regulatory health. Reconciling payroll accounts and maintaining strict federal and state compliance through detailed audits for the U.S. Department of Labor and California EDD.

Cal Poly

Prototype Vehicles Laboratory
